channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Five design strategies to make a small home appear larger
item.description: Interior designers share creative methods to create the illusion of more space in a small home.

item.title: Who is Andy Burnham, the new UK prime minister?
item.description: Former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham succeeds Keir Starmer as UK prime minister, shaped by European politics.

item.title: Overnight Russian attack on Ukraine kills several, targets Kyiv
item.description: Ukraine's air force reported that Russia launched 41 missiles and 125 attack drones overnight.

item.title: Violence repeatedly erupts in dementia care despite warnings, inspections show
item.description: Nursing homes and assisted living facilities can become hotspots for violence among dementia patients, including fatal attacks. Court records...
